out_of_scope_note: Pure-AI / mechanism-design paper on fine-tuning LLMs as digital proxies for individual humans in collective decision-making (consensus-finding). Formalizes representation as outcome-equivalent behavioural simulation by a language agent. No neural recording, no perceptual or decision-making computational model of the brain, no cognitive-mechanism claim — falls under OOS categories 'Pure-ML papers ... without biological neural content' and 'Social science / collective intelligence experiments without neural recording or computational model of the brain'.
